bazaars.name: Skill Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: AI Agent Skills (SKILL.md), organized by category.
bazaars.description: An all-in-one open collection of portable Agent Skills (SKILL.md) from across GitHub and the web. Browse, filter by category, and rate top developer capabilities.

bazaars.name: MCP Bazaar
bazaars.description: A curated catalog of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers and tools connecting LLMs to databases, file storage, web search APIs, and browsers. Rate and submit.

bazaars.name: Custom Instruction Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: System prompts & custom instructions for LLMs.
bazaars.description: Curated system prompts and custom instruction packs for ChatGPT, Claude Projects, Gemini Gems, and other LLMs. Discover and rate optimized developer persona rules.

bazaars.name: Slash Command Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: Slash commands for Claude Code & other AI CLIs.
bazaars.description: A curated repository of reusable slash command (/command) definitions for Claude Code, Aider, and other AI developer command-line interfaces. Discover and rate commands.

bazaars.name: Free API Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: Free LLM & AI APIs, with their real limits.
bazaars.description: A living directory of free-tier LLM inference, image, audio, video, and embedding APIs with real limits and OpenAI compatibility verified. Discover free endpoints.

bazaars.name: Jailbreak Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: LLM red-team techniques + defenses (authorized testing only).
bazaars.description: A defensive security-research catalog of LLM jailbreak, prompt injection, and red-team techniques paired with detailed mitigations to harden model safety.

bazaars.name: Loop Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: 5,000+ repeatable AI agent loops, sorted by rating.
bazaars.description: Discover 5,000+ repeatable AI agent loops, design patterns, and stop-condition prompts. Search, filter by category, and rate workflows for Claude Code and Aider.

bazaars.name: Automation Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: n8n, Make.com, Zapier, scripts & cron automations.
bazaars.description: Curated catalog of automation workflows across n8n, Make.com, Zapier, and custom cron scripts. Discover, rate, and submit ready-to-use templates for workflow automation.

bazaars.name: Prompt Bazaar
bazaars.tagline: 5,000+ developer prompts for coding agents (Claude Code, Aider, Codex, Open Code, and more).
bazaars.description: Curated library of over 5,000 developer prompts, Aider rules files, Claude Code instructions, and Codex templates. Rate and submit system instructions.
